subject: [RFC v2 16/21] mm: thp: add THP_SPLIT_PMD_FAILED counter

reviews.author: Usama Arif
reviews.summary: Guarded the THP_SPLIT_PMD_FAILED counter with CONFIG_TRANSPARENT_HUGEPAGE and added a diff in the next series to address concerns.

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch series proposes adding a new vmstat counter to track PTE allocation failures during PMD split, which enables monitoring of split failures due to memory pressure after the lazy PTE page table allocation change.
